# Aerarium

> Aerarium is the discipline layer between market research and your real
> portfolio. It shows you what you actually own — looking through your ETFs and
> across all your accounts — and tells you when your portfolio has drifted from
> your own written rules.

Aerarium is a brand with two products under one roof. Both are free during beta.

## Products

- **Aerarium Portfolio** (iOS app, available through TestFlight during beta): private
  portfolio monitoring. Read-only brokerage sync (it never places trades),
  ETF look-through, Policy Score, IPS cockpit, goals funding, and thesis tracking.
- **Aerarium Research** (web, research.aerarium.app): source-first public-market
  research workspace covering S&P 500 and NASDAQ-100 companies — 13F fund-overlap
  heatmaps, a macro dashboard, the market-implied Fed funds curve, revenue
  segments, financial charts, ownership/insider activity, earnings calendar, and
  a stock screener. Data from SEC EDGAR and other public sources.

## Key definitions

- **Portfolio X-Ray**: a look-through view of true exposure across direct holdings
  and the underlying holdings of funds, rolled up across all accounts.
- **Policy Score**: a transparent score for whether a portfolio still matches the
  investor's written rules, based on allocation drift, concentration, liquidity,
  goal funding, and review cadence.
- **IPS Cockpit**: a control room for an Investment Policy Statement — rules,
  versions, tolerances, and review reminders.

## What Aerarium does NOT do

Aerarium does not place trades, provide investment advice, recommend securities,
or predict prices. It shows investors their own data and public market data.

## Links

- Brand / landing: https://aerarium.app
- Aerarium Research: https://research.aerarium.app
- iOS beta (TestFlight): https://testflight.apple.com/join/Xna39VKU

## Portfolio guides

- Portfolio X-Ray and ETF look-through: https://aerarium.app/portfolio-x-ray
- Investment Policy Statement app and IPS Cockpit: https://aerarium.app/investment-policy-statement-app
- Policy Score methodology: https://aerarium.app/policy-score
- Goals funding plan: https://aerarium.app/goals-funding-plan
- Investment thesis tracker: https://aerarium.app/investment-thesis-tracker
- Security and read-only sync: https://aerarium.app/security
- Aerarium methodology: https://aerarium.app/methodology

## About

Aerarium is built by Vedang, a solo founder and CFA charterholder, from a real
personal portfolio problem: how much of any single name do you actually own once
you look through your funds and across your accounts?
